description_long: This is a modern, twin-engine airplane with a straight, mid-mounted wing configuration and a robust, angular fuselage. The engines are mounted on pylons above the wings, each housed in a cylindrical nacelle, and the tail features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer (H-tail) design. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels, all of which appear to be fixed and exposed. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, featuring a clear, enclosed canopy with visible framing. The airplane's exterior is primarily a light gray color, with the tail and engine nacelles finished in black, giving it a striking, high-contrast appearance. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, possibly military or specialized urban support role.
description: A twin-engine, mid-wing airplane with a distinctive H-tail and tricycle landing gear, finished in light gray and black. The cockpit is forward-mounted with a clear canopy, and the engines are positioned above the wings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the forward cockpit, mid-mounted straight wing, and twin black vertical stabilizers at the tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin engine nacelles above the wings, the tricycle landing gear, and the wide wingspan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit canopy, wing, and the angular tail structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, H-tail configuration, and the symmetry of the vertical stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the wings in nacelles.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, all fixed and exposed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single clear canopy.
